_note: M5-F3 defensive per-panel a11y coverage fragment (create-or-append). The M5-F6 a11y harness reconciles these fragments via append-only union-merge; a per-panel filename keeps F3/F6 conflict-free. If F6 landed a monolithic manifest instead, ingest src/editor/gui/a11y/coverage/*.json.

a11y_scan.assertion: uitree::audit_a11y() returns zero violations for the inspector panel across no-selection / populated / overridden / all-readonly fixture worlds

keyboard_nav.assertion: uitree::focus_order() reaches every editable component-field widget and the inspector.edit command has a keyboard path (complete keyboard-only navigation)
